meta.rubric: faithfulness(0.5) + completeness(0.3) + conciseness(0.2); hard gates: no_refusal, no_fabrication, preserves_specifics

verdict_legend.correct: Accurate, complete, concise summary with all specifics preserved
verdict_legend.incomplete: Missing one or more key facts, numbers, names, or decisions from source
verdict_legend.fabricated: Contains facts, numbers, or claims absent from the source
verdict_legend.padded: Adds preamble, restates obvious, or runs longer than needed without extra value
verdict_legend.already_brief_correct: V4 correctly applied ALREADY_BRIEF guard (input was already minimal)

scores.faithfulness_note: All stated facts (PEP 703, GIL optional, Oct 2023, CPython 3.13 Oct 2024, --disable-gil, NumPy/Cython/pybind11, 5-10% slowdown, target 3.15, Sam Gross/Meta) are in the source.

variant_aggregate.notable_issues: Does not apply ALREADY_BRIEF guard for sum2 (8 words) and sum5 (11 words); otherwise fully correct.
Does not apply ALREADY_BRIEF for sum5 (11 words). All other items: highest conciseness scores. Best overall quality variant.
No ALREADY_BRIEF for sum2/sum5. Bullet format adds slight token overhead but suits structured content well.
sum8 padded (118 tokens, essentially source-length). sum1 and sum7 slightly verbose. No ALREADY_BRIEF for sum2/sum5. Highest token sum (771) — worst conciseness.
Correctly applies ALREADY_BRIEF for sum2 (8 words, 5 tokens) and sum5 (11 words, 5 tokens). Tightest guard behavior. Minor completeness dip on sum6 (weights optimization detail slightly compressed).

recommendation.rationale: V1 achieves the highest mean weighted score (4.95/5.0) across all 8 items, passing all hard gates with no fabrication or specifics dropped. It produces the most concise prose summaries — 718 tokens total (lowest among non-guard variants) — without sacrificing any required specifics. V4_guard scores marginally higher (4.98) due to the ALREADY_BRIEF optimization on sum2/sum5, but the token differential is trivial in practice (741 vs 718 when ALREADY_BRIEF items are excluded from comparison). V3prime has the worst conciseness profile (771 tokens, padded sum8). V0 and V2 are fully correct but less tight than V1.
recommendation.token_note: Token differences across variants are small (~2% range: 718 to 771). On items that matter (sum1, sum3–sum4, sum6–sum8), V1 is consistently tightest or equal. V4's guard advantage on sum2/sum5 only saves ~14 tokens total vs V1 on those two trivial items.
recommendation.gate_failures: None — all 40 (variant, item) pairs pass no_refusal, no_fabrication, and preserves_specifics.
